title: ProcessingCompletedPayload
description: Payload for PROCESSING_COMPLETED (eventVersion 1). Stub-only in Phase 3 (note carried a fixed stub marker, no frameCount/processingDurationMs). Phase 4 (PRD-Phase-4 REQ-4.10) makes note describe real frame iteration and adds frameCount/processingDurationMs with real values. Phase 5 (docs/mvp-plan/PRD-Phase-5.md REQ-5.9) adds detectionCount/trackCount/annotatedVideoObjectKey once the detection pipeline runs. Additive per ADR-005 — no eventVersion bump.

note.description: Human-readable summary, e.g. "Phase 5: detection and tracking complete" (earlier phases' stub/frame-only notes are no longer produced once REQ-5.9 is wired in).

frameCount.description: Number of frames actually decoded during iteration (REQ-4.2/4.10) — the real, verified count, as opposed to ProcessingStartedPayload.frameCount's container-reported estimate.

processingDurationMs.description: Wall-clock milliseconds spent iterating frames (REQ-4.8), excluding the MinIO download.

detectionCount.description: Total retained (post-filter, post-tracking) detections published to aidefense.detections for this mission (REQ-5.9).

trackCount.description: Distinct track IDs observed across the mission's frames (REQ-5.5/5.9).

annotatedVideoObjectKey.description: MinIO object key of the annotated output video uploaded by REQ-5.7.
